summary: Frontend-only regression for Cortona Francesca. Verified new 5-language switcher (IT/EN/ES/FR/ZH) with localStorage persistence, translated navbar/home/CV/arcani/mostre/7-chakra/opere pages, updated Arcani editions (Standard 57 €, Limitata 290 €, no 220), gallery lightbox translations, WebP integrity, footer/contact social links and absence of OpenSea external redirects. All feature requirements pass.
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext does not sync document.documentElement.lang on initial mount (only on setLang). Minor SEO/a11y improvement: set it in a useEffect on mount.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language switcher opens on hover of [data-testid=lang-switcher]; options are lang-{it,en,es,fr,zh}. Persistence via localStorage key 'lang' (default 'it'). Arcani editions: edition-0=Standard 57 €, edition-1=Limitata 290 € (Only 33). Frammenti collection uses 'oil on tile'/'óleo sobre azulejo' (not canvas) — that's correct per data. Gallery clickable via [data-testid=<galleryId>-item-<i>], lightbox at [data-testid=lightbox]. Verified 22 WebP images on /arcani load with naturalWidth>0. No OpenSea links on home or /7-chakra.

detailed_checks.nav_translations: IT/EN/ES/FR/ZH all correct including Home/Arcana/Works/Exhibitions/Contact and Chinese 首页/阿尔卡纳/作品/展览/联系
detailed_checks.home_en: role, bio, CV labels (Curriculum & Training, Languages, Download CV) all translated
detailed_checks.arcani_editions: edition-0 shows 57 € Standard; edition-1 shows 290 € Limited Edition with 'Collectible box set' and 'Certificate of Authenticity'; 220 removed
detailed_checks.frammenti_lightbox: Captions translate: IT olio su piastrelle -> EN oil on tile -> ES óleo sobre azulejo
detailed_checks.chakra_en: Root/Sacral names present, no OpenSea link
detailed_checks.social_links: footer-facebook/instagram and contact-facebook/instagram all point to correct URLs
